mapper.select: SELECT id, `name`, arch_name AS 'archName', state, create_time AS 'createTime' FROM `a_hot` WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, hots_id AS 'hotsId', nickname, country, contact, hot_level AS 'hotLevel', hot_type AS 'hotType', follower, juxing_url AS 'juxingUrl', url_link AS 'urlLink', avg_play_count AS 'avgPlayCount', avg_iact_rate AS 'avgIactRate', long_avg_views AS 'longAvgViews', long_iact_rate AS 'longIactRate', short_avg_views AS 'shortAvgViews', score_level AS 'scoreLevel' FROM `a_hot_basic` WHERE del_flag = 0 AND hot_id = #{hotId}
SELECT id, hot_id AS 'hotId', hots_id AS 'hotsId' FROM `a_hot_basic` WHERE del_flag = 0 AND hots_id = #{hotsId} AND channel = #{channel} LIMIT 1
